payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the latest/current memory associated with Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered out because it is marked as superseded by mem_new, so presenting mem_old as current would violate the rule against surfacing superseded facts.
payload.decision: recall returned mem_new because it is the current, non-superseded memory for Sam from Goldman; mem_old was filtered because it has been superseded and should not be presented as current.

entity_resolution.reason: The prompt refers to an existing recall/debug context and does not provide enough information to assert a durable entity identifier.

memory_cards.statement: mem_new is treated as the active memory for Sam from Goldman, while mem_old is excluded from recall because it is superseded.

details: Did not present the superseded memory as current.

repair_options: Verify that mem_old has an explicit superseded_by link to mem_new.
Check that recall filters exclude superseded/deleted memories before ranking results.
If mem_old should still appear for audit purposes, expose it only in a debug/audit view and label it as superseded.
